why: Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:key must dispatch through Stevenarella packet_by_id using the official framed packet id and body bytes generated by the oracle answer. The official body is keybytes plus encryptedChallenge; this is packet framing/dispatch/decode evidence only, not encryption success, private-key validation, authentication success, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
what: The exact Rust oracle test panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 1, official key body bytes) because the current Protocol 775 Login serverbound version table has no mapping for official packet id 0x01.
stop_boundary: Implement only the Protocol 775 Login serverbound minecraft:key / 0x01 packet id mapping needed for the exact oracle test. Do not change official answers, broaden login runtime behavior, infer authentication success, or add later Login packets.
